title: Insert Overview Paragraph into README.md
description: Add the drafted overview paragraph to the top of the project's README.md file.
details: Open the README.md file at the root of the repository. Insert the drafted paragraph as the first content, before any setup or installation instructions. Ensure proper Markdown formatting and that the paragraph is visually prominent (e.g., placed after the main heading).
test_strategy: Preview the README.md file in a Markdown viewer to confirm the paragraph appears correctly and is the first thing users see. Check for formatting issues.

title: Commit and Push README Update
description: Commit the changes to README.md and push to the repository.
details: Stage the modified README.md file, write a clear commit message (e.g., 'docs: add app overview paragraph to README'), and push the commit to the remote repository. Ensure the commit follows the project's contribution guidelines.
test_strategy: Verify that the commit appears in the repository history and that the README.md on the remote repository displays the new paragraph as intended.

title: Draft App Overview Paragraph for README
description: Write a concise, one-paragraph explanation about the app for inclusion at the top of the README file.
details: Summarize the purpose and features of the react-starter repository in a single, clear paragraph. The paragraph should highlight the monorepo structure, built-in authentication, AI integration, and the goal of rapid developer onboarding. Ensure the language is accessible to new developers and accurately reflects the project's objectives as described in the PRD.
test_strategy: Review the drafted paragraph for clarity, accuracy, and alignment with the PRD. Optionally, have another team member review for completeness and tone.
